uniques.name: Calamity
descriptions: 150% chance to ignite on hit with fire skills
When you kill an enemy with a fire skill you take 4 fire damage over the next 2 seconds
uniques.loreText: Set the world ablaze and burn along with it

uniques.name: Fractured Crown
descriptions: You have no ward
uniques.loreText: Few goals have cost more lives than the quest for power

uniques.name: Snowblind
descriptions: 20% chance to chill on hit with cold skills
20% chance to blind on hit with cold skills
You cannot be blinded
uniques.loreText: Blind with the snow, never blinded by it

uniques.name: Artor Legacy
uniques.loreText: The great wolf Artor ran with Heorot in times long forgotten

uniques.name: Decayed Skull
descriptions: 80% increased void and necrotic damage
20% of void and necrotic damage taken as physical damage
uniques.loreText: A monument to the world's decay carved in bone and steel

uniques.name: IsadoraRevenge
descriptions: 80% increased necrotic damage if you have been hit recently
+30% mana efficiency with necrotic abilities
uniques.loreText: "...and enraged she arose with murder in her eyes..."

uniques.name: Boneclamor Barbute
uniques.loreText: "The essence of the bone seemed to reverberate within my skull. Singing and dancing into a song of fortifying vigor. Never have I felt so alive." - Ethenus, First Legate of the Immortal Legion.

uniques.name: Boneclamor Barbute
uniques.loreText: "The essence of the bone seemed to reverberate within my skull. Singing and dancing into a song of fortifying vigor. Never have I felt so alive." - Ethenus, First Legate of the Immortal Legion.

uniques.name: The Falcon
descriptions: 15% increased movement speed if you have hit an enemy in the last 5 seconds
uniques.loreText: May the dying breaths of your enemies put air beneath your wings

uniques.name: Doublet of Onos Tull
descriptions: Minions have +40% Chance to Inflict Bleed on Hit
Minions have 100% Increased Bleed Duration
uniques.loreText: The horns of the Immortal Empire fill the hearts of the living with fear, and the bones of the dead with glory

uniques.name: Prism Wraps
uniques.loreText: the elements shift like light through a prism, if you control the prism you control the elements

uniques.name: Urzils Pride
descriptions: 2% increased mana regeneration per 100 points of armor
uniques.loreText: Strength of mind and strength of body are a potent combination

uniques.name: Exsanguinous
descriptions: You lose 20% of your current health per second
Gain 20% of your missing health as ward per second
20% increased attack speed, cast speed, and movement speed if you have used a potion in the past 4 seconds
Immunity to Bleed at low health
uniques.loreText: Crazed is the mind of a blood starved Lich

uniques.name: Preparation
descriptions: +30 melee cold damage when above 65% health
30% of melee damage leeched as health when below 65% health
uniques.loreText: Yrun was wise in battle, but not in his betrayal of Heorot.

uniques.name: Titan Heart
descriptions: You do not regenerate health
uniques.loreText: Heart of stone, blood of gravel

uniques.name: Valeroot
descriptions: 10% chance to summon a Vale Spirit when you cast a Physical or Buff Spell
uniques.loreText: The roots of Eterra grow through stone and flesh and time

uniques.name: Vipertail
uniques.loreText: The bite of the viper brings lethargy and death

uniques.name: IsadoraTombbinding
descriptions: 80% increased necrotic damage if you have been hit recently
+30% mana efficiency with necrotic abilities
uniques.loreText: "...with a stake they slew her, and with silver they bound her..."

uniques.name: Ward Trail
descriptions: Gain 20 ward on dodge
uniques.loreText: Many things are fickle, few more so than life itself

uniques.name: Chains of Uleros
descriptions: 24% reduced duration of stuns on you
Your potions grant ward instead of health
uniques.loreText: Tether yourself to this mortal realm

uniques.name: Mourningfrost
descriptions: +1 cold damage to attacks and spells per point of dexterity
1% increased damage taken per point of dexterity
uniques.loreText: Spread ice with every step, like frost before sunrise

uniques.name: Stormtide
descriptions: You are shocked for 4 seconds when you stop moving
uniques.loreText: Rest was a sin among the messenger priests of Lagon, and these boots would punish the wearer accordingly.

uniques.name: Eterras Path
descriptions: You and your minions have 20% increased movement speed
You and your minions have 80% increased healing effectiveness
Every second if you are moving you have a 20% chance to cast summon vine or entangling roots
uniques.loreText: Life grows in your footsteps

uniques.name: Keepers Gloves
descriptions: 10% chance to summon a swarm of bees on melee hit (15 second cooldown)

uniques.name: Riverbend Grasp
descriptions: 15% chance to throw an axe at a nearby enemy on hit
uniques.loreText: Move with the fluidity of water, relax and you can react without resistance

uniques.name: Fighting Chance
uniques.loreText: Fight for your life

uniques.name: Boulderfists
descriptions: You cannot leech health
uniques.loreText: Strike with the force of a mountain

uniques.name: IsadoraGravechill
descriptions: +12 cold damage with spells and attacks
+100% chance to chill with necrotic abilities if you have killed an enemy in the last 5 seconds
80% increased necrotic damage if you have been hit recently
+30% mana efficiency with necrotic abilities
uniques.loreText: "...yet her strength was not blood, but of bone..."

uniques.name: Wing Guards
descriptions: You cannot deal critical strikes
uniques.loreText: Speed is its own accuracy

uniques.name: Beast King
descriptions: 8% less damage taken if your minions have killed recently
minions take 25% less damage if you have killed recently
uniques.loreText: The King of Beasts leads the charge

uniques.name: Beast King
descriptions: 8% less damage taken if your minions have killed recently
minions take 25% less damage if you have killed recently
uniques.loreText: The King of Beasts leads the charge

uniques.name: Taste of Blood
descriptions: When you hit a bleeding enemy with a melee attack all bleed stacks on that enemy double in speed
uniques.loreText: A bloody fervor clouds the mind

uniques.name: Undisputed
descriptions: 10% increased physical damage for each recent melee hit against a bleeding enemy (up to 200%)

uniques.name: Tempest Maw
descriptions: +4 Strength and Attunement
When you summon a totem you also summon 4 Storm Sprites around the totem (15 second cooldown)
uniques.loreText: A last sign of favour bestowed to those doomed to fight for Lagon's amusement in his sunken arena

uniques.name: Winters Rise
descriptions: +1% base spell damage per character level
2% increased freeze chance per character level
+4 necrotic protection per character level
When you hit an enemy with a cold skill you have a 10% chance to cast tundra nova on the target. This chance is doubled against undead.
uniques.loreText: An alliance of wengari and nomads gathered in the northern tundra, forging weapons of ice and preparing to reclaim Heoborea from the Immortal Empire.

uniques.name: Culnivars Claim
descriptions: 100% of mana converted to ward when you reach full mana
uniques.loreText: Culnivar, last scion of Liath, was a symbol of hope for the living slaves of Thetima.

uniques.name: Humming Bee
descriptions: 1% increased elemental damage per 250 ward
1% increased movement speed per 250 ward
uniques.loreText: Bzzzzzzzzzz

uniques.name: Eye of Reen
descriptions: Gain a stack of Reen's Ire for 5 seconds on melee crit
Each stack of Reen's Ire grants 5% additional critical strike multiplier and 5% increased fire damage over time
uniques.loreText: Dance through the flames

uniques.name: Rainbow Edge
descriptions: +25% chance to shock ignite and chill on melee hit

uniques.name: Cinder Song
descriptions: 10% chance to inflict Spreading Flames on Hit
-3 Mana Cost for Fire Spells
Fireball has 2 additional projectiles
uniques.loreText: An ode to fires past

uniques.name: Alchemists Ladle
descriptions: 15% chance to ignite, chill, shock, bleed, slow, poison, and blind on melee hit
uniques.loreText: infused with countless potions, it's effects are unpredictable

uniques.name: Reach of the Grave
descriptions: Your minions' spells and bow attacks deal 100% increased damage
Your minions leech 10% of damage dealt by their spells and bow attacks as health
uniques.loreText: The touch of death reaches far beyond the grave

uniques.name: Bone Harvester
descriptions: 20% chance to summon a skeleton harvester for 15 seconds on kill
uniques.loreText: Some kill without a purpose. Acolytes kill for the harvest.

uniques.name: Hammer Of Lorent
descriptions: +1 melee physical damage per level
+1% melee stun chance per level
uniques.loreText: Lorent may be gone, but its memory will remain with you as you grow.

uniques.name: Torch Of The Pontifex
descriptions: You cremate enemies you kill, burning enemies around them
You have a 10% chance to summon a burning skeleton for 10 seconds when you cremate an enemy
uniques.loreText: Pontifex Yulia, High Priest of the Immortal Empire, would sacrifice entire villages and raise burning soldiers from the ashes.

uniques.name: Stormbreaker
descriptions: +150 Lightning Protection
150% Increased Lightning Protection
uniques.loreText: Strike with the power of the storm

uniques.name: Draalsting
uniques.loreText: Poison the mind, kill the heart

uniques.name: Morditas Reach
descriptions: +500% chance to inflict Frostbite on Melee Hit
+20 Melee Cold Damage for you and your minions
uniques.loreText: Boundless ambition enshrined in ice

uniques.name: Sharktooth Saw
descriptions: 35% increased damage to bleeding targets
5% chance to cause you to bleed when you hit with your weapon

uniques.name: The Last Laugh
descriptions: Instantly kill enemies that are below 15% health
+5% melee critical strike chance if you have less than 100 dodge rating
uniques.loreText: When the headsman's blade falls, Sarno laughs in triumph

uniques.name: Volcanus
descriptions: 10% chance to cast flame shards on melee hit
uniques.loreText: Crafted in the divine era in the great forges beneath the mountains of Rahyeh

uniques.name: Dreamthorn
uniques.loreText: Eater of dreams, weaver of nightmares

uniques.name: The Monolith
descriptions: 100% reduced damage taken on block
uniques.loreText: Some slabs mark the dead, this one marks the living.

uniques.name: Close Call
descriptions: 40% increased dodge rating for each hit you have blocked recently
uniques.loreText: Light on your feet, with a foot in the grave

uniques.name: Soul Bastion
descriptions: Gains a Soul Charge on kill
At 5 soul charges, casts Soul Eruption
uniques.loreText: The weight of souls is too much for most

uniques.name: Rahyehs Light
descriptions: 50% less fire spell duration
Refresh the duration of fireshield at the cost of 80 ward at the end of its duration
uniques.loreText: Burn with the fire of the eternal sun

uniques.name: Strong Mind
descriptions: 150% of maximum mana added as stun avoidance
Cast a small lightning explosion when you are stunned
uniques.loreText: Stand Fast

uniques.name: Bleeding Heart
descriptions: You are inflicted with bleed when you cast a spell
uniques.loreText: Drink the blood of the weak

uniques.name: Chimaeras Essence
descriptions: 140% increased damage while shapeshifted
10% increased movement speed while shapeshifted
20% reduced armor and protections while shapeshifted
uniques.loreText: Shifting, Changing, Striking

uniques.name: ElementalistFrozenHeart
descriptions: 50% increased freeze duration with Snap Freeze
Casting a lightning spell gives 20% more fire damage, casting a fire spell  gives 20% more cold damage, casting a cold spell  gives 20% more lightning damage
+500 elemental protection
uniques.loreText: ...alone with ice in his heart, he gained mastery of his art...

uniques.name: The Claw
descriptions: +1 Maximum Wolf
+6 Melee Physical Damage for Minions
uniques.loreText: A wolf never hunts alone

uniques.name: Death Rattle
descriptions: Your minions take 20% increased damage
Regain 20 health on minion death
uniques.loreText: The rattle of the dying is the sound of weakness leaving the world

uniques.name: The Fang
descriptions: +1 Maximum Wolf
+12 Melee Physical Damage for Minions
Your minions cannot be stunned
uniques.loreText: A wolf never hunts alone

uniques.name: Orians Eye
descriptions: 100% increased duration of stun immunity after being stunned
uniques.loreText: The future burns within the prophetic lense

uniques.name: Ring of the Third Eye
descriptions: 30% chance to gain 15 ward on crit
uniques.loreText: forsee the strikes, imbue them with power

uniques.name: ElementalistScorchingGrasp
descriptions: Casting a lightning spell gives 20% more fire damage, casting a fire spell gives 20% more cold damage, casting a cold spell gives 20% more lightning damage
+500 elemental protection
uniques.loreText: ...his master fell, a firey death knell...

uniques.name: ElementalistStaticTouch
descriptions: Casting a lightning spell gives 20% more fire damage, casting a fire spell  gives 20% more cold damage, casting a cold spell  gives 20% more lightning damage
+500 elemental protection
uniques.loreText: ...electrified with ambition, he cast spells beyond his cognition...

uniques.name: Arboreal Circuit
descriptions: 10% chance to summon an illusory tree when hit (15 second cooldown)
uniques.loreText: You can search round and round, but you are seeking an illusion.

uniques.name: Hollow Finger
descriptions: +1 Maximum Skeleton
uniques.loreText: Only brittle skin remains

uniques.name: Tome of Elements
descriptions: +15% chance to chill, shock, and ignite with elemental abilities
uniques.loreText: The power of the elements is greatest in their most primal state

uniques.name: Grimoire of Necrotic Elixers
descriptions: 60% increased void protection, necrotic protection, and poison protection for 4 seconds on potion use
+20 necrotic damage to melee attacks and spells for 4 seconds on potion use
uniques.loreText: Take a quaff from draught of undeath

uniques.name: Heirloom of Light
descriptions: When you cast a spell while facing East you have a 20% chance to cast radiant nova
You have 1% increased spell damage per level if you have cast radiant nova recently
uniques.loreText: Wherever you go, the sun still rises in Solarum. Wherever you may be, Rahyeh is your judge.

uniques.name: Soulfire
descriptions: +160% Chance to Ignite on Hit with Fire Skills and Necrotic Skills
60% increased fire damage if you have killed an enemy recently
100% increased armor while ignited
uniques.loreText: The souls of the damned burn with eternal fire

uniques.name: Valdyrs Chalice
descriptions: 2.5% of Physical Damage Over Time Leeched as Health
When you Kill a Bleeding Enemy you regain 10 health for each stack of bleed
uniques.loreText: The blood within is said to reflect the drinker's true face

uniques.name: Orchirians Petals
descriptions: 8% Increased Mana Regen
13% Increased Cast Speed with Physical Spells
21% Increased Critical Strike Chance with Physical Spells
34% Increased Stun Chance with Physical Spells
55% Increased Health Regen
89% Increased Physical Spell Damage
uniques.loreText: Petals harvested from the remains of Orchirian the Rampant, still bright with the light of an ancient sun.

subTypes.name: Rune of Shattering
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Destroys an item, creating a random number of Affix Shards containing its powers.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Refinement
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Rerolls the values of all affixes on an item within their tiers.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Removal
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Removes a random affix on an item, returning a number of shards equal to its tier.

<font="Forum-Regular SDF"><color=#B4AD99>Experimental and Personal affixes cannot be removed this way.</font>

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Discovery
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Adds random tier 1 affixes to all empty affix slots on an item. Has an increased chance of rolling rarer affixes.

<font="Forum-Regular SDF"><color=#B4AD99>Does not cost forging potential, but cannot be applied to items with zero forging potential.</font>

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Shaping
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Rerolls all implicits on an item.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Ascendance
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Changes the item into a unique or set item of the same item type.

Using this on a Silver Ring could turn it into any unique ring, including ones that are not Silver Rings. However it cannot turn it into a Helmet.

None of the other properties of the base item are retained.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Creation
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Duplicates the item, but reduces the forging potential of both the original and the copy to 0.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Research
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Seals an experimental affix on the item. The affix is moved to its own slot, leaving its old slot open for you to add a new affix.<font="Forum-Regular SDF"><color=#B4AD99>

The sealed affix cannot be modified further and an item can have a maximum of one sealed affix.

When an experimental affix is sealed you have a chance to gain a Glyph of Insight. This chance is higher for items with higher tier affixes, but cannot exceed 45%.

</font><color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Weaving
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Transforms a random amount of the remaining Weaver's Will or Weaver's Touch on an item into additional affixes or affix tiers as if you had slain many enemies with that item equipped.

</font><color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Havoc
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Shuffles the tiers of non-sealed affixes on an exalted item with 4 non-sealed affixes.<font="Forum-Regular SDF"><color=#B4AD99>

For example an item with tier 2 strength, tier 7 dexterity, tier 3 health, and tier 2 endurance might be changed to have tier 7 strength, tier 3 dexterity, tier 2 health, and tier 2 endurance.

The rolls of the affixes within their tiers are preserved regardless of whether their tiers change.

Cannot result in all the affixes having the same tiers as before, and cannot be used on items where all the non-sealed affixes have the same tier.

</font><color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Redemption
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Randomly changes the exalted affixes on an item into different affixes. Does not change the tiers of the affixes or the rolls within the tiers.<font="Forum-Regular SDF"><color=#B4AD99>

Affixes can only be changed to ones that can spawn on this item type when dropped from a regular enemy.

Sealed affixes are unaffected.

</font><color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Rune of Evolution
subTypes.description:
Evolves an exalted item into a Primordial exalted item, upgrading a random tier 7 affix on the item into a tier 8 affix, massively increasing the affix's power and moving it to its own second sealed affix slot. The affix cannot be modified further.

Can only be used on an exalted item with at least one tier 7 affix, and no tier 8 affix.

You can only have one Primordial Item equipped at a time.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Glyph of Hope
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Modifies the outcome of a craft, granting it a 25% chance to have no forging potential cost.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Glyph of Chaos
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Modifies the outcome of a craft when upgrading an affix.

Randomly changes the upgraded affix to a different one that can spawn on that item type. It cannot change a prefix into a suffix or vice versa.

For example if you use a fire resistance shard to a raise the tier of a fire resistance suffix the tier would increase as normal and then it would change into a different affix such as cold resistance or increased health.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Glyph of Order
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Modifies the outcome of a craft when upgrading an affix.

Prevents the roll of an affix within its range changing when it is upgraded.

<color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Glyph of Despair
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Has a chance to seal an affix instead of upgrading it. The sealed affix is moved to its own slot, leaving its old slot open for you to add a new affix.<font="Forum-Regular SDF"><color=#B4AD99>

The sealed affix cannot be modified further and an item can have a maximum of one sealed affix.

Chance to seal is higher when crafting on affixes of lower tiers, and is also higher for exalted items and items with more affixes.

</font><color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Glyph of Insight
subTypes.description:
<color=#fff>Changes a prefix into an experimental affix.

Only works on gloves, boots, and belts, and does not work if the item already has an experimental affix.<font="Forum-Regular SDF"><color=#B4AD99>

The exact experimental affix it becomes and its tier are determined by the properties of the item.

Which properties determine the affix and what is required for higher tiers can be discerned through experimenting and carefully studying the numbers of the items you experiment on.

</font><color=#999>Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.</color>

subTypes.name: Glyph of Envy
subTypes.description: Changes the item's subtype to a different one with the same class requirement when adding or upgrading an affix. Cannot change the item type or result in drop-restricted subtypes. For example, a Raptor Helm could become a Tusked Greathelm, but it could not become an Arcane Visage or a Silver Ring. Can result in a higher level than you can currently equip. Press [F] to open the Crafting Panel.

subTypes.name: Arena Key
subTypes.description:
Opens the portal to The Arena in Champions' Gate.

Champions' Gate lies to the west of Heoborea past the Wengari Fortress in the Divine Era.

<color=#fff>Right Click to open the Map at Champion's Gate

subTypes.name: Arena Key of Memory
subTypes.description:
Opens the portal to The Arena in Champions' Gate.

<color=#fff>Right Click to open the Map at Champion's Gate.</color>

If an Endless Arena run is started with this key it will begin with 100 waves already completed, or half the waves you completed in your previous arena run rounded to the nearest 10, whichever is higher.

subTypes.name: Temporal Sanctum Key
subTypes.description:
Opens the door to the Temporal Sanctum dungeon in the Ruined Coast.

The Ruined Coast can be reached through the time rift behind the door in the eastern cliff face in The Shining Cove. This time rift links the Divine Era version of the cove to the Ruined Era.

<color=#fff>Right Click to open the Map at the Temporal Sanctum.

subTypes.name: Lightless Arbor Key
subTypes.description:
Opens the door to the Lightless Arbor dungeon beneath the Shrouded Ridge.

The Shrouded Ridge lies to the east of Last Refuge, and can be reached by heading north from where the Sheltered Wood exits out onto the Surface.

<color=#fff>Right Click to open the Map at the Lightless Arbor.

subTypes.name: Soulfire Bastion Key
subTypes.description:
Opens the door to the Soulfire Bastion dungeon in the Felled Wood.

To reach the Felled Wood in the Imperial Era one may head north east from the Risen Lake or north west from the Ruins of Etendell.

<color=#fff>Right Click to open the Map at the Soulfire Bastion.

subTypes.name: Harbinger Eye
subTypes.description:
Opens the gate at the Shattered Road.

To reach the Shattered Road one must prove their strength against a Harbinger.

<color=#fff>Right Click to open the Map at the Shattered Road.

subTypes.description:
A pristine feather from a Rift Beast.

Can be traded to Skarven Bloodhorn for powerful items, such as Primordial Unique Items and Runes of Evolution.

subTypes.description:

subTypes.name: Primordial Horn

subTypes.name: Crystallized Heart
subTypes.description:
A heart of a Rift Beast partially encased in living crystal.

Can be traded to Skarven Bloodhorn for powerful items, such as Primordial Unique Items and Runes of Evolution.

subTypes.name: Black Market Token
subTypes.description:
Used when purchasing an item from the Bazaar. 

Allows you to bypass the rank requirement for purchasing an item, and sets the required rank to equip the purchased item to 1. 

Also reduces the favour cost of the purchase to zero.

subTypes.name: Merchant Token
subTypes.description:
Used when purchasing an item from the Bazaar. 

Reduces the favour cost of the purchase to zero.

subTypes.name: Temporal Keystone
subTypes.description:
Grants 150-210 Stability to the current timeline

Grants maximum Stability if you have never completed the timeline before and it is not empowered.

<color=#EC2759>The fragment of crystal held by timeless metal resonates with the Epoch.

subTypes.name: Golden Resonance
subTypes.description:
Used to gift an item and bypass normal gifting restrictions.

Can be used with Normal, Magic, Rare, Set, Unique items with no Legendary Potential, and Idols.

<color=#999>Must be stored before use. Store by pressing the Transfer Materials button.</color>

subTypes.name: Obsidian Resonance
subTypes.description:
Used to gift an item and bypass normal gifting restrictions.

Can be used with Exalted items, Unique items with Legendary Potential, and Legendary items.

<color=#999>Must be stored before use. Store by pressing the Transfer Materials button.</color>

subTypes.name: Plane of Exile
subTypes.description: Contains many Rune Prisons

subTypes.name: False Temple
subTypes.description: A temple from a forgotten timeline, filled with shrines.

subTypes.name: Unclaimed Trove
subTypes.description: Lost caches abound in this graveyard of wrecked vessels.

subTypes.name: Conquered Tower
subTypes.description: Confront multiple Nemeses to scale the tower.

subTypes.name: Tomb of Vessels
subTypes.description:
Confront Majasa among the testaments to her avarice. Quell her rage and claim her riches.

Always drops a unique piece of jewelry.

subTypes.name: Tower of the Weaver
subTypes.description: An Altar of the Weaver atop a woven tower

subTypes.name: Gauntlet of Strife
subTypes.description:
Duel a sequence of empowered bosses and their champions.

Once the last enemy has fallen, it will drop two copies of the same random unique item, and you will gain access to the Sacrificial Altar. Here you can sacrifice one copy of a unique item to reroll the properties of another copy of the same unique item.

subTypes.name: Champions Colosseum
subTypes.description: A free for all between champions of the arena.

subTypes.name: Pillar of Skulls
subTypes.description: The Pillar of Skulls rises high above the Soulfire Bastion. It is here that the Lich Cremorus used soul embers to resurrect champions of ages past and ages yet to come. Stand atop the pillar and slay all champions that would rise to oppose you.

subTypes.name: The Seekers Summit
subTypes.description:
Slay Haruspex Orian, Seeker of the Shards, upon the summit of his warcamp.

Always drops a unique melee weapon.

subTypes.name: Soul Foundry
subTypes.description:
Slay enemies to collect as many soul embers as you can before the time runs out. Then spend soul embers at the Soul Gambler.

The first item purchased is always a unique.

subTypes.name: Antipode Rift
subTypes.description:
Travel back to the ancient era and destroy whatever created the antipode rift.

Always drops a unique piece of armor.

subTypes.name: Heart of the Hive
subTypes.description:
Destroy the Draal Queen deep beneath the Stonefall Mountains.

Always drops a unique ranged or caster weapon.

subTypes.name: Lostwood Folly
subTypes.description:
Slay the roaming Fateweavers among the trails and woven halls to scatter The Weaver's followers across the surrounding echoes.

Packs of The Weaver's followers in those echoes are more powerful, but drop large amounts of memory amber.

subTypes.name: The Great Bridge
subTypes.description: Break through the fortifications along the great bridge to gain access to the Forge of Fates where you can shatter your set items to reforge them.

subTypes.name: Overgrown Graveyard
subTypes.description: Help the denizens of the graveyard repel the invasive plants.

subTypes.name: Confluence of Oblivion
subTypes.description: Defeat a Shade of Orobyss of each type to reset this timeline's web of echoes and gain corruption based on the highest corruption reached in any timeline by any character with access to the same stash as this one.

subTypes.name: Threshold of Eternity
subTypes.description:
Upon the threshold Aberroth awaits.

Corruption and Echo Modifiers have no effect here.

subTypes.name: The Forgotten Keep
subTypes.description: Wade through the bloodsoaked halls to confront the Baroness.

subTypes.name: The Grand Brewery
subTypes.description: Brawl with beer in the brewery and emerge victorious to claim the Brewmaster's Buckle.

subTypes.name: Farsight Turtle
subTypes.description:
Defend the turtle of enormous girth as it transports the Transmuting Gem.

Once the attackers are defeated you can harness the gem's power to reweave the fate of your unique items that have legendary potential, either increasing it or decreasing it. The new legendary potential is rolled the same way as the legendary potential of a freshly dropped unique of that type. As such, for most uniques it is mostly likely to change the legendary potential to 0.

subTypes.name: Woven Vessel of Chaos
subTypes.description: Destroy the Vessel of Chaos in this echo to reroll the rewards of nearby uncompleted echoes.

subTypes.name: Woven Vessel of Memory
subTypes.description:
Destroy the Vessel of Memory in this echo to restore nearby completed echoes to their original states, allowing you to complete them again and claim their rewards for a second time.

Woven Echoes and echoes containing Vessels of Memory or Vessels of Chaos are unaffected.

subTypes.name: Rune Prison Complex
subTypes.description:
A runemaster fortress from which Rune Prisons are temporally displaced, and the arcane experiments they created are sealed away.

Defeat the wardens to lower the barrier around the Thaumaturgy Device and craft your own experimental items.

subTypes.name: Oerdens Watch
subTypes.description:
Time travel between the abandoned tower in the Divine Era and the refortified Lich's abode in the Imperial Era.

Defeat both the Osprix and Imperial forces to control the Relic of the Oberserver and alter the fate of your items. The Relic allows you to swap between strength, intelligence, dexterity, and attunement affixes on your items.

subTypes.name: Cemetery of Reweaving
subTypes.description: A Cemetery of the Erased where woven echoes can be exchanged for others, once the Woven Firstborn has been slain.

subTypes.name: Sepulchre of the Lost
subTypes.description: Delve into a vast Tomb of the Erased and defeat the Fateweavers to claim the echo specific rewards of all surrounding echoes.

subTypes.name: Cenotaph of Worlds
subTypes.description: Descend into a labyrinthine Tomb of the Erased and defeat the Ascendant Firstborn to weave new Tombs of the Erased into all surrounding echoes.

subTypes.name: Collapsing Horizon
subTypes.description:
Duel a Harbinger that has already slain the boss of this timeline, and claim its spoils.

It drops the same items as it would have had you slain it right after defeating the timeline boss.

subTypes.name: The Fading Brink
subTypes.description: Travel to the brink of the black hole, to the end of all timelines that Orobyss has erased. There confront a sequence of Harbingers who have slain the bosses of those timelines and reclaim the treasures they stole.

subTypes.name: Woven Beacon
subTypes.description: Charge the Great Beacon in this echo to reveal echoes in a large area around it.

subTypes.name: Vault of the Barnacle King
subTypes.description: Before he vanished, the Barnacle King stashed his treasure in a hidden vault deep beneath the ground. Search for the lost vault within the caverns and altruistically free the overburdened lizards locked within the caches.

subTypes.name: Defiled Fortress
subTypes.description:
Venture into the eastern fortress long since broken and defiled by the Harbingers. Disturb the remains of its defenders to confront the Void Nemesis and destroy it.

Completing this echo permanently adds the void nemesis to the pool of nemeses you may encounter and improves the chance for rare and exalted items' affixes to become exalted when empowering a nemesis.

subTypes.name: Bountiful Wilds
subTypes.description: Complete the objective to claim loot fit for a great Primalist.

subTypes.name: Frostfire Caverns
subTypes.description: Complete the objective to claim loot fit for a great Mage.

subTypes.name: Besieged Gardens
subTypes.description: Complete the objective to claim loot fit for a great Sentinel.

subTypes.name: Dead Forest
subTypes.description: Complete the objective to claim loot fit for a great Acolyte.

subTypes.name: Cave of Shadows
subTypes.description: Complete the objective to claim loot fit for a great Rogue.

subTypes.name: Timebeast Champion
subTypes.description: Slay a pack of randomly evolved Rift Beasts Champions to retrieve the Primordial Exalted Items they guard, each of which has a Primordial Champion Affix.

subTypes.name: Timebeast Spreader
subTypes.description:
Protect the Rift Beast Nests to spread Rift Beast encounters to surrounding echoes.

Cannot add Rift Beast Encounters to Arena Echoes, Woven Echoes, or Cemeteries of the Erased.

subTypes.name: Timebeast Ultimate
subTypes.description: Slay a rampantly evolved Rift Beast with a crystallized heart to unlock the ability to evolve your own rift beast Lineages beyond the normal limit.

subTypes.name: Bag of Uniques
subTypes.description: Drops a random number of unique items when opened.

subTypes.name: Bag of Glyphs
subTypes.description: Drops a random amount of glyphs when opened.

subTypes.name: Bag of Runes
subTypes.description: Drops a random amount of runes when opened.

subTypes.name: Bag of Gold
subTypes.description: Drops a random amount of gold when opened.

subTypes.name: Bag of Amber
subTypes.description:
Adds 5000 Memory Amber to your Weaver faction when opened.

Can only be opened when you are a member of the Weaver faction.

subTypes.name: Bag of Shards
subTypes.description: Drops a random amount of shards when opened.

subTypes.name: Bag of Primordial Materials
subTypes.description:
Drops a random combination of Primordial Horns, Fangs, Petals, and Feathers when opened.

Occasionally also drops a Crystal Heart.
